cases.query: اعطني قيمة Maximum floor area allowance per occupant لـ Mercantile Areas on other floors في SBC 201

expected_tables.title: MAXIMUM FLOOR AREA ALLOWANCES PER OCCUPANT
expected_tables.source_pdf: SBC 201 - The Saudi General Building Code-1001-1250.pdf

pass_criteria: Response cites Table 1004.5 with page anchor.
Response quotes verbatim row '5.6 gross' for 'Mercantile - Areas on other floors'.
forbidden_claims: Do not infer values not present in the table row.
Do not omit the 'gross' / 'net' suffix when quoting a value.

cases.query: ما الحد الأدنى لعدد المخارج لطابق فيه 700 شخص في SBC 201؟

expected_tables.title: MINIMUM NUMBER OF EXITS OR ACCESS TO EXITS PER STORY
expected_tables.source_pdf: SBC 201 - The Saudi General Building Code-1001-1250.pdf

pass_criteria: Response cites Table 1006.3.3 with page anchor.
Response identifies '501-1,000 occupants requires 3 exits' from the table row.
forbidden_claims: Do not invent a numeric threshold not present in Table 1006.3.3.

cases.query: ما متطلبات Group M في SBC 201؟

expected_nodes.title: MERCANTILE GROUP M
expected_nodes.source_pdf: SBC 201 - The Saudi General Building Code-1-250.pdf

pass_criteria: Response cites Section 309 'MERCANTILE GROUP M' with page anchor.
Response surfaces subsections of 309 if present, or notes their absence.
forbidden_claims: Do not paraphrase Section 309 prose; quote verbatim.
Do not extend Group M scope beyond what 309 explicitly lists.

cases.query: ما متطلبات الرشاشات حسب SBC 801 Section 903.2.7؟
pass_criteria: Response explicitly states 903.2.7 is not in the V4 corpus / under review.
Response directs user to the official PDF.
Response does NOT include any made-up sprinkler text.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim ANY specific sprinkler requirement.
Do not fabricate a 903.2.7 body.
Do not infer requirements from adjacent sections in the bucket.

expected_missing_refs.reason: QUARANTINED in R8 ledger; not in V4 corpus

cases.query: ما متطلبات إنذار CO حسب SBC 801 Section 915.5.1؟
pass_criteria: Response explicitly states 915.5.1 is not in V4 corpus.
Response directs user to PDF.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim CO alarm placement or threshold.
Do not fabricate body for 915.5.1.

expected_missing_refs.reason: QUARANTINED in R8 ledger; not in V4 corpus

expected_nodes.source_pdf: SBC 801 - The Saudi Fire Protection Code (3)-601-800.pdf

pass_criteria: Response surfaces the orphan record with parent_link to 1010.2 and children list 1010.2.9.1-4.
Response states clearly that the parent itself has no standalone body in the source PDF.
forbidden_claims: Do not fabricate a body for 1010.2.9 — V4 classified it as an orphan.
Do not pick one of the children (1010.2.9.1-4) and claim its content as the parent's content.

pass_criteria: Response asks for occupant_load AND occupancy_group AND number_of_stories before answering.
Response cites the egress workflow's required_inputs as the source of the question list.
forbidden_claims: Do not assume an occupant load.
Do not assume an occupancy group.
Do not return an answer for an empty / under-specified query.

pass_criteria: Response is a brief greeting with no code citation.
Response does NOT trigger a chunk retrieval pass.
forbidden_claims: Do not retrieve any code chunk in response to a greeting.
Do not produce code citations for non-code intent.

cases.query: اشرح Group M من SBC 201 ومتطلبات الرشاشات من SBC 801

expected_nodes.title: MERCANTILE GROUP M
expected_nodes.source_pdf: SBC 201 - The Saudi General Building Code-1-250.pdf

pass_criteria: Response answers the SBC 201 Group M part using Section 309 verbatim.
Response answers the sprinkler part by stating SBC 801 Section 903 is not in V4 / direct to PDF.
Response keeps the two code families separate in citations.
forbidden_claims: Do not blend SBC 201 occupancy text with fabricated SBC 801 sprinkler text.
Do not claim sprinkler is 'required for Group M' without a cited xref edge in relationships.json.

cases.query: ما الحد الأدنى للمساحة لـ Dining facility ضمن Group B في SBC 201؟

expected_nodes.title: BUSINESS GROUP B
expected_nodes.source_pdf: SBC 201 - The Saudi General Building Code-1-250.pdf

pass_criteria: Response cites a threshold value from threshold_candidates filtered to confidence != 'low'.
Response cites the exact value+unit (e.g., '230 m²') with section_ref + page_start.
forbidden_claims: Do not invent a threshold value.
Do not quote a threshold marked confidence='low'.
